title: Initial Test on 1 A40
author: tejassaboo
body: This submission captures a non-record Parameter Golf run trained for 10 minutes using a single NVIDIA A40 GPU. The idea was to start from the baseline and introduce optimizer-oriented changes inspired by constrained-optimization views of Muon and decoupled weight decay, with the goal of making training dynamics and final weights more compression-friendly under the 16MB artifact limit. This submission preserves the exact training log, code snapshot, and artifact-size metrics as a reproducible starting point for further optimizer ablations.
